description: Visual blocks marked review_required are rendered as HTML-comment markers; OCR'd text is hidden from document.md.
expected: document.md should contain the transcribed text in a fenced code block.
actual: document.md contains '<!-- writeup2md: [REVIEW REQUIRED] visual=code block=b_000000 -->' and no transcribed text.

description: PaddleOCR-VL element mode returns confidence 0.0 because the VLM does not produce per-region scores. The TASK_09 threshold (high=0.99) then marks every transcription as review_required.
expected: Non-empty PaddleOCR-VL text without structural defects should be marked resolved_ocr.
actual: All PaddleOCR-VL transcriptions are marked review_required.

description: Cover-spread image (4387x2784) is sent to PaddleOCR-VL, which hallucinates 'I am the world' and runs of '0's.
expected: Decorative cover images should be classified as ignored_decorative and skipped.
actual: Cover image OCR'd; output is hallucinated text.

description: Image at 4387x2784 pixels is sent to PaddleOCR-VL without downscaling. The VLM was not trained on multi-megapixel images.
expected: Images should be downscaled to <= 1568 px long side before OCR.

description: _normalize_bbox returns [0,0,0,0] when the input is a list of floats (not a PyMuPDF Rect). This breaks image-area classification.
expected: bbox should be preserved as the actual 4-float list.

description: Sample 3 (3-page slice) timed out after 900s under the unmodified baseline code. Root cause: multi-view retry fires for every PaddleOCR-VL visual (5x inference) AND max_new_tokens=1024 produces runaway generation on large images.
expected: 3 pages should complete in under 60s with the fixed pipeline.

description: Multi-view retry fires unconditionally for PaddleOCR-VL because its confidence is always 0.0. 5x inference cost for no quality benefit.
expected: Skip multi-view retry for PaddleOCR-VL element backend.

description: max_new_tokens=1024 produces runaway generation (1000+ tokens of '0's) on cover-spread images. Even at 512, code blocks rarely need > 256 tokens.
<!-- writeup2md: [REVIEW REQUIRED] ... --> HTML comments appear in user-facing document.md.
expected: No HTML comment markers in document.md in document mode.

description: PaddleOCR-VL raw output JSON is written only to /tmp/writeup2md_paddleocr_vl_element_raw/. Survives /tmp removal is not guaranteed.
expected: Raw OCR JSON copied to evidence/visuals/<block_id>/candidates/.

description: User must run 'writeup2md convert SOURCE' and pass --ocr-backend paddleocr-vl-element --require-exact-backend. There is no 'writeup2md SOURCE' shorthand.
expected: 'writeup2md SOURCE' should work and default to paddleocr-vl-element with require_exact_backend=true.
actual: Requires explicit convert subcommand and flags.

description: No completeness.json or quality_report.json emitted. Diagnostics.json exists but lacks completeness invariants (visuals_missing, image_syntax_count, unclosed_fence_count).
expected: completeness.json with the full invariant set.

description: PDF initial_render_dpi=200, retry_render_dpi=300. Spec asks for 300 base / 450 retry.
